allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(p['id']\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in d.get\('paths',{}\).keys\(\)]")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/db/chapters -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"project_id":"test","number":1,"title":"第一章测试"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/db/chapters -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"project_id":"0d451d08-a4e0-4dab-9683-3fdc7b8157af","number":1,"title":"第一章测试"}')
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from backend.main import app; print\('Backend OK'\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/writing -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"chapter_id":"outline","instruction":"大纲","context":"小说类型：【都市言情】，核心元素：热血激情，要求：1.故事主线 2.主要人物 3.章节结构"}' --max-time 5)
Bash(timeout 3 curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/writing -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"chapter_id":"outline","instruction":"大纲","context":"test"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8000/api/writing/" -H "Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8" -d '{"chapter_id":"outline","instruction":"大纲","context":"小说类型：【都市言情】，核心元素：热血激情"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8000/api/db/characters" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"project_id":"09e69b84-bd96-4e8c-a43c-574965424067","name":"张三","personality":"霸道总裁","alias":"","speech_style":"","forbidden_topics":[]}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8000/api/db/characters" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"project_id\\":\\"09e69b84-bd96-4e8c-a43c-574965424067\\",\\"name\\":\\"张三\\",\\"personality\\":\\"霸道总裁\\"}")

Bash(timeout 20 bash -c 'curl -s -N -X POST "http://localhost:8000/api/writing/" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"chapter_id\\":\\"outline\\",\\"instruction\\":\\"大纲\\",\\"context\\":\\"小说类型：【玄幻修仙】，核心元素：热血激情\\"}" 2>&1')
